name: flowcms
description: Flow CMS — an AI-powered, self-hostable headless CMS. Monorepo: studio (admin UI), api (headless backend), and shared packages.

scripts.docker:build:studio: docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile --target studio-runner --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/api -t flowcms-studio:local .
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:build:api && npm run docker:build:studio
scripts.prod:up: cd deploy && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.prod:down: cd deploy && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down
scripts.prod:logs: cd deploy && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f
